paper_title: Study of Water Hyacinth of Bangladesh IV: Comparative Study of Pollen Grains and Development of Seed in Both Long and Short Petioled Forms of Eichhornia crassipes (Mart.) Solms-Laubach

methods.description: Measurement of length and breadth of seeds obtained from water hyacinth plants of different forms (Long Petioled - LPs, Short Petioled - SPs) and pollination types. These measurements were used for statistical comparison.

steps.description: Obtain seeds from water hyacinth plants (LPs and SPs) subjected to different pollination types (natural, artificial self, artificial cross).
steps.searchable_summary: Collect seeds from water hyacinth plants based on pollination type and plant form.
inputs: Water hyacinth plants with mature capsules/seeds

steps.description: Measure the length of the collected seeds.
steps.searchable_summary: Measure the length of individual seeds.

steps.description: Measure the breadth of the collected seeds.
steps.searchable_summary: Measure the breadth of individual seeds.

steps.description: Record the seed length and breadth measurements, associating them with the plant type and pollination type.

methods.method_name: Statistical Analysis of Seed and Capsule Data
methods.description: Application of statistical methods, following the method of Islam, to compare quantitative data related to seeds and capsules (length, breadth, number of capsules, number of seeds, percentages) between different groups (plant forms, pollination types) to determine statistical significance.

steps.description: Compile quantitative data on seed length, breadth, number of capsules per inflorescence, number of seeds per capsule, percentage of seed-bearing capsules, and percentage of empty capsules for different groups (LPs, SPs, natural, artificial self, artificial cross pollination).
steps.searchable_summary: Compile and organize quantitative biological data for statistical analysis.

steps.description: Perform statistical analysis on the compiled data according to the method of Islam.
steps.searchable_summary: Apply statistical tests to compare groups based on biological measurements and counts.
outputs: Statistical test results (e.g., p-values, test statistics)

steps.description: Determine the statistical significance of the observed differences between groups (e.g., at the 1% level).
steps.searchable_summary: Assess statistical significance of test results.
outputs: Statements of statistical significance (e.g., significant, insignificant)

steps.description: Report the findings of the statistical analysis, indicating which differences were significant.

methods.method_name: Assessment of Seed and Capsule Production under Different Pollination Types
methods.description: Evaluation of the outcome of natural, artificial self, and artificial cross-pollination on capsule and seed formation in water hyacinth plants (LPs, SPs). This involved performing artificial pollination (including supporting flowers above water) and quantifying capsule and seed production metrics (number of capsules per inflorescence, number of seeds per capsule, percentage of seed-bearing/empty capsules) for comparison across pollination types and plant forms.

steps.description: Perform artificial self-pollination on water hyacinth flowers.
steps.searchable_summary: Manually perform self-pollination on water hyacinth flowers.

steps.description: Perform artificial cross-pollination on water hyacinth flowers.
steps.searchable_summary: Manually perform cross-pollination on water hyacinth flowers.
inputs: Water hyacinth flowers from different plants/forms

steps.description: Support artificially pollinated flowers above water level using a net or similar means.
steps.searchable_summary: Provide physical support for pollinated flowers above water.

steps.description: Collect mature capsules from naturally pollinated, artificially self-pollinated, and artificially cross-pollinated plants (LPs and SPs).
steps.searchable_summary: Collect mature fruit capsules from water hyacinth plants based on pollination type and plant form.
inputs: Water hyacinth plants with mature capsules

steps.description: Count the number of capsules per inflorescence for each pollination type and plant type.
Count the number of seeds per capsule for each collected capsule.
Calculate the percentage of seed-bearing capsules for each pollination type and plant type.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate percentage of capsules containing seeds.

steps.description: Calculate the percentage of empty capsules for each pollination type and plant type.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate percentage of capsules without seeds.

steps.description: Record all counts and percentages, associating them with the plant type and pollination type.
steps.searchable_summary: Record capsule and seed counts/percentages with metadata.
outputs: Structured dataset of capsule and seed production metrics
